title: anthemis pseudocotula subsp. rotata
intro: Anthemis pseudocotula subsp. rotata, also known as Pineapple Weed, is a perennial herb in the daisy family with a strong, pineapple-like scent. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pineapple Weed include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the ability to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pineapple Weed can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
